name: Raise a dragon!
description:
Ever wanted to raise a dragon to be your partner in crime? Or probably to play on the swings with you? This is a bot where your choices and actions with the bot will determine how the dragon will grow! So be careful, and have fun.

If you don't like the bot, comment the reason and I'll make adjustments as needed. But don't flat out hate. ❤️
creator: Nova Novak
